name: zutil_zrdr_pop_free_node
description: zUtil_ZRDR::PopFreeNode removes the free-pool head node, optionally grows the pool when allowed, maintains the circular list, and updates free/grow counters.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zUtil_ZRDR_PopFreeNode@4 at 0x48c8e0 still fails: 79 unmasked mismatches, 22 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 105 bytes, VC object symbol size 112 bytes.

Reviewed difference is local register allocation and counter-update scheduling: VC saves edi and places the null-return block before the grow path, while the original keeps only esi live and branches to the null-return epilogue.
The native smoke exercises preallocated pop, grow-on-demand through payload pushes, singleton and multi-node removal, null pop, and free-count restoration.
